query:
SELECT
                e.target_id AS paragraph_id,
                p.id AS paper_id,
                p.doi,
                COALESCE(p.title, '') AS "title!"
            FROM edges e
            JOIN papers p ON p.id = e.source_id
            WHERE e.target_id = ANY($1)
              AND e.relationship = 'asserts'
              AND e.source_type = 'paper'
